summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Cape Jervis Wine premium website. All 13 core features tested successfully including age verification, navigation, content sections, mobile responsiveness, and smooth scroll animations.
passed_tests: Age verification modal appears on first visit with localStorage persistence
Hero section displays with lighthouse background, title 'Cape Jervis Wine', and CTA button
Navigation bar with all required links (About, Wines, Terroir, Trade, Contact)
Navigation links scroll smoothly to correct sections using framer-motion
About section displays complete brand story content
Wines section shows 3 wine cards (Shiraz, Chardonnay, Cabernet Sauvignon) with tasting notes and pairing info
Terroir section displays regions and growing conditions information
Trade/Global Markets section with distribution information and CTA
Contact form with all required fields (Name, Email, Company, Enquiry Type, Message, Newsletter checkbox)
Contact form submission works as visual mockup with alert confirmation
Footer displays with 'Please enjoy responsibly' legal disclaimer
Mobile responsive design with functional hamburger menu
Smooth scroll animations and framer-motion effects working correctly
